title: SpellCraft: Awakening
description: Embrace the magic and explore a world where fantasy meets reality ✨
body:
<center>

![Spacer Art](https://i.ibb.co/KxNxSmx/In-Witched-Spacer.png)

![SpellCraft: Awakening Art Logo](https://i.imgur.com/0Rx4lGZ.gif)


[![Twitter (aka X) @_barryz_](https://i.ibb.co/FKgqZsr/Twiiter-X.png)]([https://twitter.com/_barryz_](https://twitter.com/_barryz_))

![Spacer Art](https://i.ibb.co/KxNxSmx/In-Witched-Spacer.png)

![Overview](https://i.ibb.co/tYyJVXN/Overview-NEW.png)

SpellCraft: Awakening is illustrated through fantasy generation that focuses on bringing magic to the world of Minecraft

In addition to simplistic addons that enhance the base game SpellCraft: Awakening revolutionizes the complexity by adding dimensional mods, mobs, and tools!

![SpellCraft: Awakening House GamePlay GIF](https://i.imgur.com/ZPxEIx4.gif)

![SpellCraft: Awakening Action GamePlay GIF](https://i.imgur.com/bYvfZF4.gif)

![Spacer Art](https://i.ibb.co/KxNxSmx/In-Witched-Spacer.png)

![Mod Elements](https://i.ibb.co/Fs9Z5Wh/Elements-NEW.png)

Mod-Pack Highlights:

Oh The Biomes We've Gone:

![OTBWG LOGO](https://i.imgur.com/YwdZFN1.png)

An astounding sequel to the original BYG mod for 1.20.1+ with over 50+ biomes ranging from the magical to the realistic and all breathtaking!

Aether:

![ATHR LOGO](https://i.imgur.com/f07AJ1X.png)

The Aether Team presents the original Aether mod! Maintained and kept up to date for modern versions of Minecraft and fully compatible with multiplayer!

Ars Nouveau:

![ARSN LOGO](https://i.imgur.com/hAwgTCv.png)

Craft spells and construct magical automations

Twilight Forest:

![TWLTFRST LOGO](https://i.imgur.com/3Wm23yh.png)

A realm basked in mystery and eerie twilight, you will overpower terrifying creatures and secure the adventure of a lifetime; in the Twilight Forest.

*MODRINTH DOES NOT SUPPORT DISTRUBUTION OF THE TWILIGHT FOREST MOD VIA MODPACKS *

Farmers Delight:

![FRMSDT LOGO](https://i.imgur.com/k9gaL71.png)

A cozy expansion to farming and cooking!

Hexerei:

![HXR LOGO](https://i.imgur.com/fvvBwgK.png)

A mod based off witchcraft and lore within it. Welcome to the world of Hexerei!

Occultism:

![OCTM LOGO](https://i.imgur.com/mlDqP0b.png)

A ritual magic system centered around summonable spirits allows you to automate various tasks, store vast amounts of items, let demons mine in void dimensions, create powerful enchanted tools and jewelry, get support from familiars, and much much more.

InWitched:

![INWITCHED LOGO](https://i.imgur.com/kEmUbFO.png)

Simple yet ✨ Whimsical | Experience 🪄 Witchcraft in Minecraft
